title: monnina macrostachya var. normalis
intro: Monnina macrostachya var. normalis, also known as the "Guanabano de las montañas" or Mountain Guanabana, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Monnina macrostachya var. normalis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a digestive aid. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
